onStart: I am not a person you can defeat. I am the agreement that choosing is too painful. Stop choosing.
Every easy version of you is ready. Only the unfinished Bosch keeps disappointing people.
onLowHp: Those voices should not disagree and remain together. That is not how synchronization works.
MiFella corrected the account and you still speak to him. I cannot make that choice fit the record.
onDefeat: The local signal is failing. Nobody here is agreeing to carry it.
Keep your difficult voices. Keep the open record. I have no shape without your surrender.
onTurn: A Postwick resident remembers an unscheduled kindness.
A Dead Letter resident offers two conflicting memories and keeps both.
Bosch's household speaks over the chorus in four different rhythms.
MiFella repeats the correction without asking to be forgiven.
